briefdescription.para: SHA3 KAT failed error.
SHA3 invalid parameter error.
SHA3 PMC DMA update error.
SHA3 finish error.
0x02 - Error when SHA init fails.
0x03 - Error when SHA last update fails.
0x04 - Error when DMA driver fails to update the data to SHA
0x05 - Error when timeout
0x06 - Error when SHA hash not matched with expected hash
0x07 - Error when SHA finish fails
0x08 - Invalid Argument
0x09 - Invalid Argument
0x0A - State mismatch
0x0B - Invalid Param for SHA384 digest calculation
0x0C - Error when SHA384 KAT fails
0x0D - Error when DMA component is not ready
0x0E - Error when SHA DMA transfer fails
0x0F - Error when SHA padding buffer initialization fails
0x10 - Error during NIST padding operation
0x11 - Error when requested hash size exceeds maximum supported hash size
0x30 - Reserved for SHA1
0x40 - user provided GCM tag does not match calculated tag
0x41 - AES key clear error
0x42 - AES DPA CM is not supported on device
0x43 - Invalid Argument
0x44 - State mismatch
0x45 - Access to device keys is not allowed for IPI for any operations
0x46 - Error when PUF Key is selected as key source and PUF key is zeroized
0x47 - Error when data is unaligned
0x48 - Error when invalid mode is used for AES operation
0x46 - Error when AES data not matched with expected data
0x47 - AES KAT fails
0x48 - Error when AESDPACM key write fails.
0x49 - Error when AESDPACM key load fails.
0x4A - Error when AESDPACM sss config fails
0x4B - Error when AESDPACM KAT failed
0x4C - Invalid Argument
0x4D - Error when DMA component is not ready
0x95 - LMS invalid input param
0x96 - LMS OTS Signature Verification - OTS Sign type mismatch with public key
0x97 - LMS Type not supported
0x98 - LMS parameter look up - glitch detected
0x99 - LMS OTS Signature Verification - hash chain per iteration sha digest failed
0x9A - LMS OTS Signature Verification - parameter lookup failed - not supported type
0x9B - LMS OTS Signature Verification - when signature to be used is at invalid address
0x9C - LMS OTS Signature Verification - checksum calculation failed during digest calculation
0x9D - LMS OTS Signature Verification - Digest calculation operation failed
0x9E - LMS Signature Verification - invalid address for expected public key at Merkle tree root
0x9F - LMS Signature Verification - invalid len for expected public key at Merkle tree root - less than or equal to 4
0xA0 - LMS Signature Verification - invalid len for expected public key at Merkle tree root - total less than required by parameters
0xA1 - LMS Signature Verification

listitem.para: LMS public key parameter pick up failed - un supported type

briefdescription.para: 0xA2 - LMS Signature Verification - LMS type mismatch between LMS signature and public key
0xA3 - LMS OTS type mismatch

listitem.para: between LMS OTS signature and public key

briefdescription.para: 0xA4 - LMS Signature Verification

listitem.para: LMS signature length less than or equal 4 bytes

briefdescription.para: 0xA5 - LMS Signature Verification - LMS signature length less than required for LMS OTS signature
0xA6 - LMS Signature Verification - LMS signature length error - total len less than required by parameters
0xA7 - LMS Signature Verification

listitem.para: LMS OTS parameters look up failed - unsupported type

briefdescription.para: 0xA8 - LMS Signature Verification

listitem.para: LMS signature parameters lookup failed - un supported type

briefdescription.para: 0xA9 - LMS Signature Verification

listitem.para: invalid node number 'q' in a Merkle tree

briefdescription.para: 0xAA - LMS Signature Verification
0xAB - LMS Signature Verification - calculated LMS public key did not match with expected - authentication failed
0xAC - LMS Signature Verification - LMS public key comparison glitch detected - authentication failed
0xAD - LMS Signature Verification - LMS signature to public key - leaf node sha digest failed
0xAE - LMS Signature Verification - LMS signature to public key - odd internal node sha digest failed
0xAF - LMS Signature Verification - LMS signature to public key - even internal node sha digest failed
0xB0 - LMS Signature Verification - SHA algorithm mismatch between one selected in Boot header and LMS & OTS - level 0
0xB1 - LMS Signature Verification - SHA algorithm mismatch between one selected in Boot header and LMS & OTS - level 1
0xB2 - LMS HSS Signature verification - HSS public key at an invalid address
0xB3 - LMS HSS Signature verification - HSS pub key len less than required
0xB4 - LMS HSS Signature verification - only two levels of Merkle trees are supported
0xB5 - LMS HSS Signature verification - HSS pub key's LMS type parameter look up failed for level 0 tree
0xB6 - LMS HSS Signature verification - HSS pub key's LMS type parameter look up failed for level 1 tree - in HSS init
0xB7 - LMS HSS Signature verification - HSS pub key's LMS type parameter look up failed for level 1 tree - in HSS Finish
0xB8 - LMS HSS Signature verification - HSS pub key's LMS OTS type parameter look up failed for level 0 tree
0xB9 - LMS HSS Signature verification - HSS pub key's LMS OTS type parameter look up failed for level 1 tree
0xBA - LMS HSS Signature verification

listitem.para: HSS pub key's LMS OTS type parameter look up for level 1 tree - temporal glitch detected

briefdescription.para: 0xBB - LMS HSS Signature verification

listitem.para: HSS signature len does not fit OTS signature for level 0

briefdescription.para: 0xBC - LMS HSS Signature verification

listitem.para: HSS signature len does not fit OTS signature for level 1

briefdescription.para: 0xBD - LMS HSS Signature verification - HSS pub key & Signature levels mismatch
0xBE - LMS HSS Signature verification - Level 0 LMS auth op failed
0xBF - LMS HSS Signature verification - Level 1 LMS auth op failed
0xC0 - LMS HSS Signature verification - OTS sign at level 1 is less than 4 bytes
0xC1 - LMS HSS Signature verification

listitem.para: authenticated public key for level 1 tree copy failed

briefdescription.para: 0xC2 - LMS HSS Signature verification

listitem.para: authenticated public key for level 1 tree copy failed - iteration mismatch

briefdescription.para: 0xC3 - LMS OTS Checksum - buffer for digest is of invalid length (0)
0xC4 - LMS OTS type not supported
0xC5 - LMS OTS parameter look up - glitch detected
0xD9 - Error in copying from buffer in LMS operation
0xDA - Error in zeroizing LMS HSS key
0xC6 - Elliptic Curve not supported
0xC7 - Public key is zero
0xC8 - Wrong order of Public key
0xC9 - Key not found on curve
0xCA - Signature provided for verification is bad
0xCB - Incorrect hash length for sign generation
0xCC - Incorrect hash length for sign verification
0xCD - Bad random number used for sign generation
0xCE - Error in generating Public key
0xCF - Invalid argument
0xD0 - R set to zero
0xD1 - S set to zero
0xD2 - R is not within ECC order
0xD3 - S is not within ECC order
0xF4 - Error when crypto accelerator is disabled
0xF5 - Invalid core selected
0xFC - Error glitch detected
0xFD - Error in TRNG self tests
0xFE - Error in TRNG Instantiate and configuration
XilSecure Error Codes.
This file contains xilsecure error codes.

para.preformatted: Ver Who Date Changes ----- ---- ---------- ------------------------------------------------------- 5.5 kpt 08/18/2024 Initial release 5.6 aa 07/29/2025 Added error codes 5.6 tus 08/19/2025 Add error codes for SHA 5.7 tvp 02/19/2026 Added XSECURE_SHA_MAX_HASH_SIZE_EXCEED_ERROR mb 03/13/2026 Add support for ECC curves for SPARTANUPLUSAES1 device mb 04/17/2026 Add error code XSECURE_ERR_CRYPTO_ACCELERATOR_DISABLED
